narrative: Middle East uncertainty and claims of a US-Iran draft agreement drive USD demand — DXY +0.00% as Fed's Barkin signals policy is well-positioned for ongoing shocks. USD/JPY firms to 159.04, supported by a 300bp Fed-BoJ carry advantage, while GBP/AUD (+0.55% vs -0.76%) emerges as the week's dominant G8 theme with a 1.31% spread. Gold lower -0.44% near $4,522; equities +0.17%; VIX 16.8. Watch Japan CPI at 23:30 UTC for JPY directional risk.
